_comment: Twomiah Factory — feature manifest for crm-homecare template. Maps feature IDs (as selected in the wizard) to the backend route and service files they require. The generator strips any route/service file NOT listed here for the selected feature set.

evv_sandata.label: EVV — Sandata Integration
evv_sandata.description: Electronic Visit Verification via Sandata (required for Medicaid billing in most states). Includes EVV visit logging, EDI 837 claim generation, and remittance processing.

evv_worcs.label: EVV — WORCS Integration (Wisconsin)
evv_worcs.description: Electronic Visit Verification via Wisconsin's WORCS system. Includes EVV visit logging only — EDI/claims handled separately through ForwardHealth.

payroll_gusto.label: Payroll — Gusto Sync
payroll_gusto.description: Sync caregiver hours and pay rates to Gusto for payroll processing. Manual payroll export is always available; this feature adds automatic sync.

payroll_manual.label: Payroll — Manual / Export Only
payroll_manual.description: Payroll processing with CSV/PDF export. No third-party sync. Use this if you process payroll manually or through a system other than Gusto.

_notes.evv: evv_sandata and evv_worcs are mutually exclusive — agencies use one or the other. Wisconsin agencies typically use evv_worcs.
_notes.payroll: payroll_gusto and payroll_manual are mutually exclusive. If neither is selected, payroll routes are excluded from the build.
_notes.claims: claims.ts and remittance.ts are only included with evv_sandata since they require EDI infrastructure.
_notes.stripe: stripe.ts is always included in core — it handles the agency's own subscription billing to Twomiah Care, not patient billing.
